text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen, the dream stage for El Condor
Pasa's climactic battle royale with her friends, is
finally here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a race where all of the strongest Umamusume
gather, and for El Condor Pasa, it's the takeoff
point to the rest of the world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As excitement from the audience reaches a fever
pitch, all three friends let each other know they
have no intention of losing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa steps on to the course of her
dream match, hoping to claim victory against her
rivals and take flight around the world.
